name: next-static
description: Next.js App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind for landing pages, marketing sites, and frontend-first sites.
ci_policy: Core CI remains stack-neutral. Run optional frontend CI when frontend/package.json is present and this profile is selected or under review.
deploy_notes: Deploy as a static or frontend-first Next.js site after product/design approval and task verification.

name: next-fullstack
description: Next.js App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind, with backend and data decisions made later, for SaaS or app-like sites.
ci_policy: Core CI remains stack-neutral. Add backend/data checks only after concrete backend decisions are recorded.
deploy_notes: Choose hosting, database, auth, and environment handling in a later approved task before release.

name: astro-content
description: Astro for SEO/content-heavy sites, blogs, and documentation.
ci_policy: Core CI remains stack-neutral. Add Astro checks after the Astro project is scaffolded.
deploy_notes: Deploy as static content unless an approved task adds server behavior.

name: sveltekit
ci_policy: Core CI remains stack-neutral. Add SvelteKit checks after the SvelteKit project is scaffolded.
deploy_notes: Choose adapter and runtime after the product/design brief confirms deployment needs.

name: custom
description: A user-defined stack selected after clarification.

commands.install: Record the selected stack install command in STACK.md.
commands.dev: Record the selected stack dev command in STACK.md.
commands.lint: Record the selected stack lint command in STACK.md.
commands.build: Record the selected stack build command in STACK.md.

ci_policy: Core CI remains stack-neutral until custom stack checks are explicitly documented.
deploy_notes: Record deploy notes in STACK.md or an approved task before release.
